tagline: Fitness blossoms. Earth thrives. Collect life.

designSystem.style: Organic hand-drawn with natural unbleached paper textures, asymmetric blob border-radii, wavy SVG dividers, floating gem animations at three parallax depth layers, and earthy ink-like outlines. Hub-and-spoke navigation with 4 asymmetric cards varying in size and corner shape. Light/dark theme toggle.
